foundational_triad.base: unity + multiplicity. Irreducible third modality = context = Koestler's holon = Sartre's third-party. Geometry: vortical. Structure: holarchy. Field: unific. Only unificities are actual; pure unity/multiplicity are virtual
modality of THINGS. Every unity is a multiplicity of at least two. Geometry: lateral. Structure: holism. Field: unitive (vision/representation)
modality of SETS OF THINGS. Every multiplicity is a unity of at least one. Geometry: vertical. Structure: hierarchy. Field: multiplicative (ordering)

foundational_triad._meta: generative triad from which TAPS, RIP, and Dialectic unfold. Config space = 1, each modality is a 1-prime (different mode of being-one)

dialectic.base: context window / before-after frame / enables synchronicity of the other three

T.base: specific vector of involution / densification / enfolding
causal character of directional pairs: evo/invo=timelike, expansion/condension=spacelike, rarefaction/condensation=lightlike

A.collision: != clinical depression (though structural parallel may exist)

A._meta: how-I-am / being-axis / athesis. Dipoles: anopression (upward/outward, decreasing difficulty) and anapression (downward/inward, increasing difficulty). Chain: anopression <- expression <- impression <- adpression <-> compression -> depression -> suppression -> oppression -> anapression. Alpha = anapressive phase constant (L12). Sigma = anopressive phase constant (L21). See §5.45

P.base: praxis as active intentional dwelling (protonomic register)

P._meta: how-I-act / action-axis / praxis proper. Definition: the process of projection & reflection in consumptive consummation. Praxis always conserved (via consummation in laminar flow, §5.38). Practico-inert = gas/fuel (sedimented past praxis). Praxistatic = engine (active interface). REVERSED from §5.24, see §5.43

S.base: convergence toward shared hexitive ground (group level)

S._meta: how-I-create / creation-axis / synthesis at TAPS level. Syntegration always consumed (via consumption in turbulent flow, §5.38). Law: minimal praxis for maximal syntegration = variational principle = principle of least action (§5.50)

RIP._meta: direction through TAPS space / flow function. TAP=rate, TAPS=position, RIP=direction. 8 configs (2^3) x 6 orderings (3!) = 48 states. R^(I^P) != (R^I)^P. Death = mode-lock (flip freq -> 0). Falsification: Stage 3X-RIP with F1-F8 (§5.30)

decisions_archive.what: Trust stability metric: CV-squared vs raw variance
decisions_archive.why: Scale-invariant; raw variance fails with dM 1-100 range

decisions_archive.what: Junction metric: symmetric vs asymmetric trust
decisions_archive.why: Asymmetric makes cross-metathesis eligibility depend on evaluation order

decisions_archive.what: Absorptive family creation: conditional vs unconditional
decisions_archive.chose: Unconditional (always create family on absorptive cross)
decisions_archive.why: Conditional guard silently skipped first-gen agents

validation_log.detail: All entries from design doc §4.2-4.8. Dialectic, T, A, P, S, RIP and cross_source.
All 7 phases were pure implementation. No new theoretical concepts.
RB:Level_I-IV cross_source entries. Preliminary — deep review pending.
Source: Unificity.md. Holarch: unificity=holarchy(vortical), unity=holism(lateral), multiplicity=hierarchy(vertical).
Living-from-metathesis, serialized beings, absorptive=metathematization, time=praxitive deferral, 4 fields, reception field, facade/face.
22 Sartre->sigma-TAP mappings. Key: immanence=anapression, transcendence=anopression, praxis-process=consummation.
Tetravalent assemblage=L-matrix, conjunction vs connection, 4 diagnostic meters. 4 D forms = 4 L-channels (3rd independent tetra-mapping).
Original L11/L12/L21/L22 confirmed. Type V vortical. Six criteria. Two-stage active adaptation. Three frozen maladaptive states.

validation_log.check: OST deep dive — 4 new sources, 16 Emery mappings
validation_log.detail: Distilled: opensystemstheory.org, Emery-M-2000, Emery-Emery-1974/2022, deGuerre-2016. Total distilled sources: 20.
Reciprocity gauge, CDF/Maxwell's demon, simulacrum scale, six criteria diagnostic. Added: transaction_biunimodal, reciprocity_gauge, directive_correlation_CDF, simulacrum_levels.

L-channel phase space + limit cycles. Trilaminar ring: ano/meso/ana. Inter-ring distance = directive correlation. Nested rings for groups. Added: secular_cycles, elite_overproduction, trilaminar_rings.
Turchin 2013, Turchin-Gavrilets 2009, Turchin JGH 2009. Ring-volution: top=evolution, bottom=involution, meso=transvolution. Total sources: 23.
Double helix with RNA-like meso. Syntegration/praxis ring mappings. Janus through-lines. Seven pressure vectors as cross-bridges. Alterity cascade.

4 concepts mapped (ActiveInfoStorage, ClusteringCoefficient, LoopRequirement, FeedforwardEchoes), 5 integration points. Re-distilled with v5 skill (cropped figures, interpretation file). Key novel finding: unidirectional interactions contribute nothing to identity storage.
